title: rosa arvensis subvar. ovata
intro: Rosa arvensis subvar. ovata, also known as the wild rose of the fields, is a plant species within the Rosa arvensis family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa arvensis subvar. ovata include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Rosa arvensis subvar. ovata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
